description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push and pull request events for the master branch. Use a macos-latest job to check out the repository, force a compatible Xcode version, print the Xcode version, and then run a series of scripts to install wxWidgets, generate xcconfigs, build pwsafe, install dependencies for creating a dmg, get the Xcode build output location, move the app to another folder, create a dmg, and upload it as an artifact.
